sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92315" key="r(efani/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥεφᾰνίς</orth>, <sense id="n92315.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥαφανίς</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥέφᾰνος</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥάφανος</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
